<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Sunfed Agro Ventures | Fresh Eggs & Sustainable Poultry in Maiduguri</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Climate-smart poultry farm in Maiduguri producing fresh eggs and poultry. Solar-powered cooling and sustainable feed for local production.">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Crimson+Pro:wght@400;600;700&family=Work+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        :root {
            --sun: #E07A3C;
            --sun-light: #F4A261;
            --earth: #2A4A3C;
            --earth-light: #4A7C59;
            --cream: #FAF6F0;
            --sand: #E8DCC8;
            --text-dark: #1A1A1A;
            --text-mid: #4A4A4A;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif;
            background: var(--cream);
            color: var(--text-dark);
            line-height: 1.6;
        }

        /* Header */
        header {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            width: 100%;
            background: rgba(250, 246, 240, 0.98);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            z-index: 1000;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(224, 122, 60, 0.15);
        }

        nav {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0.8rem 1.5rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.6rem;
        }

        .logo-img {
            height: 40px;
            width: auto;
        }

        .logo-text {
            font-family: 'Crimson Pro', serif;
            font-size: 1.3rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--earth);
        }

        .nav-links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-mid);
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }

        .nav-links a:hover {
            color: var(--sun);
        }

        .contact-btn {
            background: var(--sun);
            color: white;
            padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-weight: 500;
            transition: background 0.3s ease;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
        }

        .contact-btn:hover {
            background: var(--earth);
            color: white !important;
        }

        /* Hero */
        .hero {
            padding: 8rem 1.5rem 4rem;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--cream) 0%, var(--sand) 100%);
            text-align: center;
        }

        .hero-content {
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .hero-logo {
            max-width: 100px;
            margin: 0 auto 1.5rem;
        }

        h1 {
            font-family: 'Crimson Pro', serif;
            font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--earth);
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            line-height: 1.1;
        }

        .tagline {
            font-size: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.2rem);
            color: var(--text-mid);
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .products {
            font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 2.5vw, 1rem);
            color: var(--sun);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .hero-btn {
            display: inline-block;
            background: var(--sun);
            color: white;
            padding: 0.8rem 2rem;
            text-decoration: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            border: 2px solid var(--sun);
        }

        .hero-btn:hover {
            background: var(--earth);
            border-color: var(--earth);
        }

        /* Sections */
        section {
            padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        h2 {
            font-family: 'Crimson Pro', serif;
            font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.5rem);
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--earth);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .section-intro {
            text-align: center;
            max-width: 700px;
            margin: 0 auto 2rem;
            font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.1rem);
            color: var(--text-mid);
            line-height: 1.7;
        }

        /* About Section */
        .about {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
        }

        /* Products Grid */
        .products-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
            gap: 1.5rem;
        }

        .product-card {
            background: white;
            padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
            text-align: center;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
        }

        .product-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-4px);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
        }

        .product-icon {
            font-size: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
        }

        .product-card h3 {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: var(--earth);
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .product-card p {
            color: var(--text-mid);
            line-height: 1.6;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
        }

        /* Problem Section */
        .problem {
            background: var(--earth);
            color: var(--cream);
            padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }

        .problem h2 {
            color: var(--cream);
        }

        .problem-content {
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.15rem);
            line-height: 1.7;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .problem-highlight {
            color: var(--sun-light);
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        /* Innovation Cards */
        .innovation-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
            gap: 1.5rem;
        }

        .innovation-card {
            background: white;
            padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
            border-left: 4px solid var(--sun);
        }

        .innovation-icon {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
        }

        .innovation-card h3 {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: var(--earth);
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .innovation-card p {
            color: var(--text-mid);
            line-height: 1.6;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
        }

        /* Founder Section */
        .founder {
            background: var(--sand);
            padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
        }

        .founder-card {
            max-width: 900px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 0;
        }

        .founder-image {
            height: 280px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .founder-image img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            display: block;
        }

        .founder-details {
            padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
        }

        .founder-name {
            font-family: 'Crimson Pro', serif;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--earth);
            margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
        }

        .founder-title {
            color: var(--sun);
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .founder-bio p {
            color: var(--text-mid);
            line-height: 1.7;
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
        }

        .credentials {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 0.8rem;
            margin-top: 1.2rem;
            padding-top: 1.2rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--sand);
        }

        .credential-badge {
            background: var(--sand);
            padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
            border-radius: 15px;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--text-mid);
        }

        /* Contact Section */
        .contact {
            background: var(--earth);
            color: var(--cream);
            padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
        }

        .contact h2 {
            color: var(--cream);
        }

        .contact-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 1.2rem;
            max-width: 500px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .contact-item {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            border-radius: 8px;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .contact-icon {
            font-size: 2rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
        }

        .contact-label {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--sun-light);
            margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
        }

        .contact-value {
            font-size: 1rem;
            color: var(--cream);
            word-break: break-word;
        }

        .contact-value a {
            color: var(--cream);
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }

        .contact-value a:hover {
            color: var(--sun-light);
        }

        /* Footer */
        footer {
            background: var(--text-dark);
            color: rgba(250, 246, 240, 0.6);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            text-align: center;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            line-height: 1.5;
        }

        /* Desktop/Tablet Overrides */
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            nav {
                padding: 1rem 2rem;
            }

            .logo-img {
                height: 50px;
            }

            .logo-text {
                font-size: 1.5rem;
            }

            .hero {
                padding: 10rem 2rem 5rem;
            }

            .hero-logo {
                max-width: 150px;
                margin-bottom: 2rem;
            }

            .hero-btn {
                padding: 1rem 3rem;
                font-size: 1.1rem;
            }

            section {
                padding: 4rem 2rem;
            }

            .about {
                padding: 4rem 2rem;
            }

            .section-intro {
                margin-bottom: 3rem;
            }

            .products-grid {
                gap: 2rem;
            }

            .product-card {
                padding: 2.5rem;
            }

            .product-icon {
                font-size: 4rem;
                margin-bottom: 1rem;
            }

            .product-card h3 {
                font-size: 1.4rem;
                margin-bottom: 1rem;
            }

            .product-card p {
                font-size: 1rem;
            }

            .problem {
                padding: 4rem 2rem;
            }

            .innovation-grid {
                gap: 2rem;
            }

            .innovation-card {
                padding: 2.5rem;
            }

            .innovation-icon {
                font-size: 3rem;
                margin-bottom: 1rem;
            }

            .innovation-card h3 {
                font-size: 1.3rem;
                margin-bottom: 1rem;
            }

            .innovation-card p {
                font-size: 1rem;
            }

            .founder {
                padding: 4rem 2rem;
            }

            .founder-card {
                grid-template-columns: 300px 1fr;
            }

            .founder-image {
                height: auto;
            }

            .founder-details {
                padding: 3rem;
            }

            .founder-name {
                font-size: 1.8rem;
                margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
            }

            .founder-title {
                font-size: 1rem;
                margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            }

            .founder-bio p {
                font-size: 1rem;
                margin-bottom: 1rem;
            }

            .credentials {
                gap: 1rem;
                margin-top: 1.5rem;
                padding-top: 1.5rem;
            }

            .credential-badge {
                padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
                font-size: 0.85rem;
            }

            .contact {
                padding: 4rem 2rem;
            }

            .contact-grid {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
                gap: 2rem;
                max-width: 900px;
            }

            .contact-item {
                padding: 2rem;
            }

            .contact-icon {
                font-size: 2.5rem;
                margin-bottom: 1rem;
            }

            .contact-label {
                font-size: 0.85rem;
                margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
            }

            .contact-value {
                font-size: 1.1rem;
            }

            footer {
                padding: 2rem;
                font-size: 0.9rem;
            }
        }

        /* Hide desktop nav on mobile */
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
            .nav-links {
                display: none;
            }
        }

        /* Animations */
        @keyframes fadeInUp {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(30px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        .hero-content > * {
            animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease forwards;
            opacity: 0;
        }

        .hero-logo { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
        h1 { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
        .tagline { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
        .products { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
        .hero-btn { animation-delay: 0.5s; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <header>
        <nav>
            <div class="logo-container">
                <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Sunfed Logo" class="logo-img">
                <div class="logo-text">SUNFED</div>
            </div>
            <div class="nav-links">
                <a href="#about">About</a>
                <a href="#products">Products</a>
                <a href="#innovation">Innovation</a>
                <a href="#contact" class="contact-btn">Contact Us</a>
            </div>
        </nav>
    </header>

    <!-- SECTION 1: HERO -->
    <section class="hero">
        <div class="hero-content">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Sunfed Agro Ventures" class="hero-logo">
            <h1>SUNFED AGRO VENTURES</h1>
            <p class="tagline">Climate-Smart Poultry Farming in Maiduguri</p>
            <p class="products">Fresh Eggs • Sustainable Poultry • Locally Produced</p>
            <a href="#contact" class="hero-btn">Contact Us</a>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- SECTION 2: ABOUT -->
    <section id="about" class="about">
        <h2>About Sunfed</h2>
        <p class="section-intro">
            Sunfed Agro Ventures is a poultry farm in Maiduguri that produces fresh eggs and poultry using climate-smart farming methods, including solar-powered cooling and alternative feed innovation.
        </p>
    </section>

    <!-- SECTION 3: WHAT WE PRODUCE -->
    <section id="products">
        <h2>What We Produce</h2>
        <div class="products-grid">
            <div class="product-card">
                <div class="product-icon">🥚</div>
                <h3>Fresh Table Eggs</h3>
                <p>Locally produced eggs delivered fresh from our farm in Maiduguri. Produced using sustainable methods for consistent quality.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="product-card">
                <div class="product-icon">🐔</div>
                <h3>Broiler Chicken</h3>
                <p>Quality poultry raised using climate-adapted systems designed for Maiduguri's hot climate.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="product-card">
                <div class="product-icon">🌱</div>
                <h3>Sustainable Poultry Products</h3>
                <p>Raised with solar-powered cooling and alternative feed sources to ensure environmental sustainability.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- SECTION 4: WHY SUNFED EXISTS -->
    <section class="problem">
        <h2>Why Sunfed Exists</h2>
        <div class="problem-content">
            <p>
                Maiduguri relies heavily on <span class="problem-highlight">eggs transported from other states</span> due to heat stress and high feed costs affecting local poultry production. 
            </p>
            <p style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
                Sunfed Agro Ventures is building <span class="problem-highlight">climate-smart poultry systems</span> that make local egg production more resilient and affordable.
            </p>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- SECTION 5: OUR INNOVATION -->
    <section id="innovation">
        <h2>Our Innovation</h2>
        <div class="innovation-grid">
            <div class="innovation-card">
                <div class="innovation-icon">☀️</div>
                <h3>Solar-Powered Cooling</h3>
                <p>Our poultry houses use solar-powered cooling systems to maintain optimal temperatures, overcoming Maiduguri's extreme heat without electricity costs.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="innovation-card">
                <div class="innovation-icon">🐛</div>
                <h3>Black Soldier Fly Larvae Feed</h3>
                <p>We supplement commercial feed with protein-rich black soldier fly larvae, reducing feed costs by 20-40% while creating a circular nutrient system.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="innovation-card">
                <div class="innovation-icon">🌡️</div>
                <h3>Climate-Adapted Systems</h3>
                <p>Our farming methods are specifically designed for hot regions, making poultry production viable even in temperatures exceeding 40°C.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- SECTION 6: ABOUT THE FOUNDER -->
    <section class="founder">
        <h2>About the Founder</h2>
        <div class="founder-card">
            <div class="founder-image">
                <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Muhammad Buhari Haruna">
            </div>
            <div class="founder-details">
                <h3 class="founder-name">Muhammad Buhari Haruna</h3>
                <p class="founder-title">Founder & CEO</p>
                <div class="founder-bio">
                    <p>
                        Muhammad Buhari Haruna is a Civil Engineering graduate from the University of Maiduguri (2025) with a passion for entrepreneurship and sustainable agriculture.
                    </p>
                    <p>
                        Combining engineering expertise with practical farming knowledge, he founded Sunfed to address Maiduguri's reliance on imported eggs through climate-smart local production.
                    </p>
                </div>
                <div class="credentials">
                    <span class="credential-badge">🎓 Civil Engineering, UNIMAID</span>
                    <span class="credential-badge">💡 Design Thinking, DDQIC Queens</span>
                    <span class="credential-badge">🚀 Entrepreneur & Innovator</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- SECTION 7: CONTACT -->
    <section id="contact" class="contact">
        <h2>Get in Touch</h2>
        <div class="contact-grid">
            <div class="contact-item">
                <div class="contact-icon">📍</div>
                <div class="contact-label">Location</div>
                <div class="contact-value">Damboa Road, Maiduguri, Borno State</div>
            </div>
            <div class="contact-item">
                <div class="contact-icon">📱</div>
                <div class="contact-label">WhatsApp</div>
                <div class="contact-value"><a href="https://wa.me/2348147811474">08147811474</a></div>
            </div>
            <div class="contact-item">
                <div class="contact-icon">📧</div>
                <div class="contact-label">Email</div>
                <div class="contact-value"><a href="mailto:bharuna6569@gmail.com">bharuna6569@gmail.com</a></div>
            </div>
            <div class="contact-item">
                <div class="contact-icon">📷</div>
                <div class="contact-label">Instagram</div>
                <div class="contact-value"><a href="https://instagram.com/sunfedagro" target="_blank">@sunfedagro</a></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <footer>
        <p>&copy; 2026 Sunfed Agro Ventures. Fresh Eggs • Sustainable Poultry • Locally Produced in Maiduguri, Borno State.</p>
    </footer>
</body>
</html>
